title: LinkedIn Post Concepts: AI-Summary to CRM Feature
summary: This document outlines several LinkedIn post concepts, including carousels and single images, designed to promote Strolid's AI-summary to CRM feature. It details hooks, visuals, and messaging strategies to engage automotive dealership audiences by addressing common pain points.
text:
Transformation Story chapter 1
Social channel: LinkedIn     |     Format: carousel     |     Length: 4 pages
1. Hook: Plant doubt to create emotional trigger
a. Visuals: Chaotic and overwhelming
2. Pattern Interrupt: Frames "missing notes" as transparency problem, not 
documentation.
a. Visuals: Cryptic note close-up
3. Authority Play: Positions Strolid as the technology leader,. Short and 
punchy.
a. Visuals: Intro to yellow AI icon that is used throughout with "The PORTAL". 
Up arrow = performance increase, airplane pointing to desired action.
4. Close: Emphasizes ownership ("YOUR") and core values that end with results. 
Low-friction CTA through education.
a. Visuals: Clean, on brand, and leveraging formatting with values to create 
a natural path for the eye to travel to expected bottom right exit point 
with Assessment CTA.
Caption
Will be written based on the content after concept approval.
#AutomotiveTechnology #AIforDealers #StrolidPortal 
#ConversationalIntelligence

The Accountability Gap Story chapter 1
Social channel: LinkedIn     |     Format: carousel     |     Length: 3 pages
1. Authority: Immediate differentiation. "We work inside" = tribal signaling to 
those who get it.
a. Visuals: Abbreviated notes envelope with "ALERT" red question mark.
2. Value Contrast: Makes the beneﬁt tangible. Ties directly to tagline.
a. Visuals: Split screen concept - messy notes vs. clean interface.
3. Feature Reveal: Lists speciﬁc tools. "Fix + Optimize" creates desire for 
improvement.
a. Visuals: "The PORTAL" with AI icon (consistency), with products/features.
Caption
Will be written based on the content after concept approval.
#AutomotiveTechnology #AIforDealers #StrolidPortal 
#ConversationalIntelligence

The Note Nobody Can Read
Social channel: LinkedIn     |     Format: single image    |     Aspect: 4:5 (1,600x2,000)
1. Opens with a challenge, agitates with the abbreviation reality, then delivers 
the solution with authority.
Post Caption
Your BDC left a note.
Can you read it?
LM. CB@6p. FUNW. VMNM.
Here's the problem: If YOU can't understand your CRM notes, you can't manage 
your BDC.
The Portal delivers complete, real-time call summaries directly into your 
dealership CRM.
The Portal delivers complete, real-time call summaries directly into your 
dealership CRM.
Strong Process. Solid Results.
#AutomotiveTechnology #AIforDealers #StrolidPortal 
#ConversationalIntelligence

Stop Listening to Calls Like It's 2012
Social channel: LinkedIn     |     Format: single image    |     Aspect: 4:5 (1,600x2,000)
1. Opens with a time-based pattern interrupt that modernizes the conversation, 
creating urgency to anyone who is still listening to calls.
Post Caption
Why are you still listening to random call recordings hoping to understand 
what your BDC is doing?
The Portal delivers:
•  AI-summarized conversations
• Searchable interaction history  
• Real-time notes in YOUR CRM
Level up your BDC accountability with conversational intelligence.
Because your customers deserve better than "LM CB@6p."
Strong Process. Solid Results.
#AutomotiveTechnology #AIforDealers #StrolidPortal 
#ConversationalIntelligence
